Metadata.description: Padel Factory: 2 clubs, 7 courts in Agadir. Book your slot online and experience padel differently.

Hero.title: Padel like you've never experienced
Hero.subtitle: Two clubs. Seven courts. One mission: deliver the best padel experience in Agadir.

agadir.name: Padel Factory Agadir
agadir.description: Located in the heart of Agadir, our flagship club features 4 state-of-the-art courts, a sporty and welcoming atmosphere, and an active community all week long.

universiapolis.name: Padel Factory Universiapolis
universiapolis.description: Located at Universiapolis, this 3-court club offers a modern and dynamic experience ideal for students, competitors and casual players.
